evals.prompt: Research the CTO of Appier, Shou-De Lin. I have an ML Engineer interview with them next week.
evals.expected_output: Produces docs/research/appier-cto-shou-de-lin.md covering personal background (NTU professor turned industry), Appier AI tech stack (AIXON, CrossX, etc.), team overview, open source/academic output, interview prep advice

evals.prompt: Look into Google DeepMind's Taipei office — what is their research team working on?
evals.expected_output: Produces docs/research/google-deepmind-taipei-team.md focused on the team (not a specific person), covering research directions, known members, published papers, hiring signals, recent news

evals.prompt: Help me look into the AI infra team at NVIDIA, specifically the people working on NIM microservices
evals.expected_output: Produces docs/research/nvidia-nim-microservices-team.md covering NIM technical architecture, team positioning within NVIDIA org, core product details, related hiring, interview advice. Should focus on the NIM team rather than CEO-level leadership
